title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Jain Irrigation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Jain Irrigation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Jain Irrigation in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Jain Irrigation:
Jain Irrigation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jain Irrigation!
